title: ExtractionManifest
description: UOR metadata sidecar for deepseek_delta_uor.safetensors. Records the provenance, DARE parameters, and UOR address for every extracted delta tensor.

uor_stage.description: UOR-FORGE pipeline stage that produced this artefact.

uor_donor.description: HuggingFace model id of the fine-tuned teacher model.

base_model.description: HuggingFace model id of the base model used to compute deltas.

vector_target.description: The behavioural target that the extracted vectors encode.

patching_mode.description: Whether this was a live DARE extraction or a dry-run.

dare_p.description: DARE drop probability. Fraction of delta weights zeroed.

dare_rescale.description: DARE rescale factor applied to surviving weights. Equals 1/(1-p).

top_n_components.description: Number of top-ranked Stage 1 components included in extraction.

signal_rank_threshold.description: Maximum Stage 1 rank included (components with rank > this are excluded).

num_tensors.description: Number of delta tensors saved to the safetensors file.

total_parameters.description: Total number of scalar parameters across all extracted tensors.

total_nonzero_parameters.description: Number of non-zero parameters after DARE sparsification.

overall_sparsity.description: Fraction of parameters zeroed across all tensors (0.0 = dense, 1.0 = all zero).

layer_head_map_path.description: Absolute path to the Stage 1 layer_head_map_deepseek.json consumed.

layer_head_map_status.description: Value of _status field in the consumed layer_head_map.

safetensors_path.description: Absolute path to the output safetensors file.

extraction_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when extraction completed.

runtime_seconds.description: Wall-clock time in seconds for the full extraction run.

uor_address_note.description: Human-readable note about the placeholder status of uor_address fields.

tensor_key.description: Key used in the safetensors file for this tensor.

component_type.description: Whether this tensor is from an attention head or MLP layer.

head.description: Zero-indexed attention head index. Null for MLP tensors.

source_layers.description: List of transformer layers that contributed to this tensor.

uor_address.description: Placeholder UOR coordinate address. Format: uor://<namespace>/<layer>/<component>/<head>. Full resolution pending cat9 coordinate schema.

patch_effect_mean.description: Mean patch effect score from Stage 1 for this component.

rank.description: Stage 1 rank of this component (1 = highest mode-switching signal).

dare_p.description: DARE drop probability applied to this tensor.

dare_rescale.description: DARE rescale factor applied to surviving weights.

sparsity_achieved.description: Actual fraction of weights zeroed after DARE (may differ from p due to sampling).

tensor_dtype.description: Data type of the saved tensor.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the tensor bytes for integrity verification.

extraction_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this tensor was extracted.
